rule.name: Ensure S3 bucket access logging is enabled on the CloudTrail S3 bucket
rule.description: S3 Bucket Access Logging generates a log that contains access records for each request made to your S3 bucket.
rule.impact: Non-compliance with CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations 3.6 — Ensure S3 bucket access logging is enabled on the CloudTrail S3 bucket
rule.remediation: Remediate per CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations v1.5.0 section 3.6.

message: [cis_aws/3.6] failed: Ensure S3 bucket access logging is enabled on the CloudTrail S3 bucket
